# Career-Ops Dashboard — Visual, UX, UI & Design Breakdown

**Last updated:** 2026-05-09  
**URL:** https://dashboard.careers-ops.com  
**Stack:** Node.js HTTP server (`dashboard-server.mjs`) · Static HTML generated by `scripts/build-dashboard.mjs` · Cloudflared tunnel (localhost:3000 → public URL)

---

## 1. Visual Design

### Color System

| Role | Light mode | Dark mode | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| Background | `#f6f8fa` | `#0d1117` | Page background |
| Surface | `#ffffff` | `#161b22` | Cards, panels, tables |
| Surface-raised | `#f6f8fa` | `#1c2128` | Hover rows, nested blocks |
| Border | `#d0d7de` | `#30363d` | All cards and table lines |
| Text-primary | `#1f2328` | `#e6edf3` | Body text |
| Text-muted | `#57606a` | `#8b949e` | Labels, captions, metadata |
| Text-faint | `#8c959f` | `#484f58` | Timestamps, deemphasized |
| Accent-green | `#2da44e` / `#1a7f37` | `#238636` / `#3fb950` | Score ≥ 4.0, Apply-Now, strong match |
| Accent-blue | `#0969da` | `#1f6feb` / `#58a6ff` | Links, evaluated status, info |
| Accent-purple | `#8250df` | `#bc8cff` | Verify button, interview status, story bullets |
| Accent-amber | `#9a6700` / `#d4a017` | `#f0a733` | Applied, moderate score, pick-one throttle |
| Accent-red | `#cf222e` | `#f85149` | Rejected, blocked, cooldown |

### Score Badge Color Ramp

| Score | Light bg | Light text | Dark bg | Dark text |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ≥ 4.0 (strong) | `#dafbe1` | `#1a7f37` | `#1a3d27` | `#3fb950` |
| 3.0–3.9 (moderate) | `#fff8c5` | `#9a6700` | `#3d2d00` | `#f0a733` |
| < 3.0 (weak) | `#eaeef2` | `#57606a` | `#21262d` | `#8b949e` |

### Typography

| Element | Font | Size | Weight | Treatment |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Page title | System UI | 26px | 700 | — |
| Section heading (h2) | System UI | 18px | 600 | Bottom border |
| Panel title | System UI | 18px | 600 | — |
| Stat card value | System UI | 24px | 600 | Color-coded |
| Stat card label | System UI | 11px | 400 | Uppercase, letter-spacing 0.5px |
| Table header | System UI | 13px | 600 | Sticky, sortable |
| Table body | System UI | 13px | 400 | — |
| Badges | System UI | 11px | 600 | Tabular nums |
| Code / monospace | `ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo` | 12px | 400 | Verify query blocks |

### Layout

- **Max width:** 1400px, centered
- **Page padding:** 24px
- **Grid gaps:** 12px (stat cards), 18px (panels)
- **Stat card grid:** `repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr))` — responsive, collapses to 2-col on narrow viewports
- **Border radius:** 8px (cards/panels), 6px (detail blocks), 4px (badges/bars), 99px (pill counters)
- **Box shadows:** Only on panel-strong (green border, 6px green shadow) and modals (20–32px rgba shadows)

---

## 2. UI Components

### Stat Cards (top row)

Six KPI cards in a responsive grid. Each card:
- Shows a label (11px uppercase) + numeric value (24px bold)
- Is **clickable** — expands an inline panel below the grid
- Shows `▾ click to expand` caret hint
- Highlights on hover with a blue glow; turns green-glow for the Apply-Now card
- Card receives `.active` class when its panel is open

**Cards:**
1. **Apply-Now (≥ 4.0)** — green accent when non-zero; opens Apply-Now queue table
2. **Total evaluations** — opens full evaluations panel (score buckets + status breakdown + recent table)
3. **Applied / In process** — opens applied/in-flight table
4. **Pipeline pending** — opens pipeline URL list
5. **Companies tracked** — static, no expand
6. **URLs scanned** — static, no expand

### Stat Expand Panels

Each panel appears below the stat grid (not in a modal — inline, full-width). Panels are mutually exclusive: opening one closes any other open panel.

**Panel structure:**
- Title + live pill indicator
- For `apply-now` / `applied`: full sortable table (same columns as main tables)
- For `evaluations`: score-bucket cards grid + by-status cards grid + recent evaluations table
- For `pending`: pipeline URL list

Full table columns: `# | Score | Tier | Company | Role | Status | Date | Action`

Each row in the panel table is expandable (click → shows TL;DR, notes, JD URL inline).

Action column: `Report · Apply · Verify` links.

### Main Apply-Now Panel

Below the stat row. Distinct styling:
- **2px green border** + green box shadow (`panel-strong`)
- Green pill counter on title
- Same table columns as stat expand panels
- Throttle banners per row (⭐ pick-one, ⏸ defer, 🛑 blocked/cooldown) rendered as color-coded left-bordered banners inside each expanded row
- Throttle visual states on the row itself: `inset 4px 0 0 {color}` left-edge bar

### All Evaluations Table

Full sortable table of all 140+ evaluations:
- **Filter bar**: text search, tier dropdown (A1/A2/B), min score, status
- **Sortable columns**: click headers for sort (numeric or alpha)
- **Row expand**: click any row → detail panel with TL;DR (green left bar), competitive edges (one per bullet, with score badge + evidence), positioning angle, STAR stories, JD URL
- **Alternating hover** background on hover
- **Action column**: Report (opens pre-rendered HTML in browser) · Apply (JD URL) · Verify (purple, opens modal)

### Score / Status Bars

Bar charts for Score Distribution and Top Companies panels:
- Grid layout: `140px (label) | 1fr (bar) | 50px (count)`
- Bar fill: `linear-gradient(90deg, #54aeff, #2da44e)`
- Bar track: `#eaeef2` / `#21262d` dark

### Toolbar

Sticky-top row with page title + two buttons:
- **☀︎ Light / ⏾ Dark** — dark mode toggle (persists to `localStorage`)
- **⚡ Batch** — appears only when a batch is running; toggles the batch overlay

---

## 3. UX Patterns

### Stat Card → Inline Table Drill-Down

The primary navigation pattern. No page load, no modal — the panel slides in below the stat cards. This keeps context visible (you can still see all six KPIs while reading the expanded list). Clicking the same card or another card collapses and re-expands.

**Data flow:** click → `toggleStatPanel(key)` → panel opens → `apiFetch('/api/detail/{key}')` → `renderStatPanel(key, data)` → full HTML table injected → `_loadedPanels[key] = true` (cached, no re-fetch).

### Row Expand Pattern

Both main tables and stat-panel tables use the same expand pattern:
- Click any `<tr class="row">` → toggle the adjacent `<tr class="detail-row">`
- Detail rows are pre-rendered server-side (main tables) or client-side (stat panels)
- Action links (`Report`, `Apply`, `Verify`) stop propagation so they don't trigger the expand

### Verify Claims Modal

Triggered by `Verify` link in any action column. Full-page overlay with:
1. **CV match claims** — key bullets from Block B to substantiate
2. **STAR stories** — label + detail for each story from Block F
3. **Final recommendation** — from report
4. **Research queries** — three pre-built copyable queries for Grok (social signals), Perplexity (deep research), and Claude (AI synthesis)
5. **Evidence textarea** — paste research findings; Save button → writes to Block H of the `.md` report file via `POST /api/save-evidence`

Closing: click backdrop or ✕ button.

### Batch Progress Overlay

Floating panel, bottom-right, 360px wide. Appears automatically when `/api/batch-live` returns `total > 0`. Features:
- Progress bar (gradient fill, animated `transition: width 0.5s`)
- Live stats: Completed / Failed / Running / Pending counters
- Recent completions list (last 5 completed jobs)
- Polls every 2 seconds; stops polling when `completed >= total && running === 0`
- Dismissible (✕); toolbar button re-opens it
- Disappears automatically when batch finishes

### Dark Mode

- Triggered by toolbar button; persists via `localStorage('career-ops-dark')`
- On first visit: respects `prefers-color-scheme: dark` system preference
- All color tokens have explicit dark-mode overrides (via `body.dark .class` selector pattern — no CSS variables)
- Dark palette follows GitHub's dark mode (`#0d1117` base, `#161b22` surface, `#30363d` borders)
- Badges, status pills, left-edge throttle bars all have dark-mode variants

### Live Stats Refresh

- On load: `refreshLiveStats()` fetches `/api/stats` and updates the six KPI card values in-place (no flicker — just number substitution)
- Repeats every 30 seconds
- On load: `pollBatch()` starts immediately + repeats every 2s (stops when batch done)
- `BASE` detection: if `window.location.hostname` is not localhost or `.careers-ops.com`, all API calls are skipped silently (static / offline mode still works)

---

## 4. Information Architecture

```
Career-Ops Dashboard
├── Toolbar (title + dark toggle + batch toggle)
├── Stat Cards (6 KPIs)
│   ├── Apply-Now ─────────────────────────────────────► [Apply-Now Table]
│   ├── Total Evaluations ─────────────────────────────► [Buckets + Status + Recent Table]
│   ├── Applied / In process ──────────────────────────► [Applied Table]
│   ├── Pipeline pending ──────────────────────────────► [Pipeline List]
│   ├── Companies tracked (static)
│   └── URLs scanned (static)
├── Apply-Now Queue Panel (static, pre-rendered, expandable rows)
├── All Evaluations Panel
│   ├── Filter bar (text + tier + score + status)
│   └── Full table (sortable, expandable rows)
├── Score Distribution (bar chart)
└── Top Companies (bar chart)

Overlays
├── Batch Progress Overlay (floating, auto-show when batch running)
└── Verify Claims Modal (triggered from any table row Action column)
```

---

## 5. Data Flows

| What | Source | Refresh |
|---|---|---|
| Stat card numbers | `GET /api/stats` → `parseApplications()` | On load + every 30s |
| Stat expand panels | `GET /api/detail/{key}` → `detail*()` functions | On first card click (cached) |
| Main table rows | Pre-rendered at build time by `build-dashboard.mjs` | On next `node scripts/build-dashboard.mjs` run |
| Report detail (TL;DR, edges, etc.) | Pre-extracted at build time | On next build |
| Batch progress | `GET /api/batch-live` → reads `batch/batch-state.tsv` | Every 2s while batch runs |
| Verify modal | `GET /api/verify/{slug}` → parses report `.md` on demand | Per-click, no cache |
| Evidence save | `POST /api/save-evidence` → appends to report `.md` | Immediate |

---

## 6. Server Architecture

| Process | Port | File | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|
| `dashboard-server.mjs` | 3000 | root-level | Static file server + live API endpoints |
| cloudflared tunnel | — | `~/.cloudflared/config.yml` | Exposes port 3000 as `dashboard.careers-ops.com` |
| (legacy) `scripts/dashboard-server.mjs` | 7777 | scripts/ | Old static-only server (still running via launchd, not tunneled) |

**API endpoints on port 3000:**

| Endpoint | Method | Response |
|---|---|---|
| `/` | GET | `dashboard/index.html` |
| `/api/stats` | GET | KPI counts (applyNow, totalEvals, applied, etc.) |
| `/api/batch-live` | GET | Batch progress (total, completed, failed, running, rows) |
| `/api/detail/apply-now` | GET | Apply-Now rows with report summaries |
| `/api/detail/evaluations` | GET | All evals + score buckets + status breakdown |
| `/api/detail/applied` | GET | Applied/Interview/Offer rows |
| `/api/detail/pending` | GET | Pipeline pending items |
| `/api/report/{slug}` | GET | Single report summary |
| `/api/verify/{slug}` | GET | Verify payload (claims, STAR, queries) |
| `/api/save-evidence` | POST | Append Block H evidence to report `.md` |

---

## 7. Accessibility & Performance

- **No JavaScript framework** — vanilla JS only, zero dependencies in the browser
- **Offline fallback** — all main table data is baked into the static HTML; API calls are optional enrichment
- **Sticky table headers** — `position: sticky; top: 0` on `<th>` for long table scroll
- **Keyboard-navigable links** — all action links are proper `<a>` elements
- **Touch target sizing** — badges and buttons have adequate padding (min 28px touch height)
- **HTML pre-rendering** — 748 report `.md` files are pre-converted to styled `.html` at build time (`dashboard/reports/*.html`); no markdown-to-HTML conversion in the browser
- **API response caching** — stat panels cache their loaded data in `_loadedPanels` object; no duplicate fetches
- **Build time** — full rebuild (140 evaluations, 748 reports): ~30–60 seconds

---

## 8. Build & Deploy Commands

```bash
# Rebuild dashboard HTML (run from career-ops root)
node scripts/build-dashboard.mjs

# Start dynamic server (auto-started via launchd)
node dashboard-server.mjs --port=3000

# Check tunnel status
ps aux | grep cloudflared

# Reload tunnel after config change (e.g. port change)
pkill -HUP cloudflared

# View dashboard locally
open http://localhost:3000

# View via tunnel
open https://dashboard.careers-ops.com
```

---

## 9. Known Issues & Future Improvements

| Issue | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Old `scripts/dashboard-server.mjs` still running on :7777 | Open | Launchd plist still references old script; low priority since tunnel now points to :3000 |
| Stat panels load live data only (not static fallback) | By design | Static baked-in table below is the offline fallback |
| `build-dashboard.mjs` run required to pick up new evaluations | Open | Could auto-trigger after `merge-tracker.mjs`; currently manual |
| Report expand TL;DR in stat panels requires live server | Open | Pre-baking report summaries into the panel JSON at build time would fix this |
| Dark mode stat-panel `.pill` color not overridden | Fixed in current build | Added `body.dark .stat-panel-title .pill` rule |
